sc.political.s: FEC: Molson Coors PAC contributed $280K+ to Republican candidates 2020-2024; MillerCoors executives donated majority to Republican recipients.
sc.environment.s: No EPA enforcement actions or named pollution events on record; water use disclosed in sustainability reports but no third-party certification.
sc.labor.s: No NLRB unfair labor practice findings or OSHA fatalities on record for Miller/Molson Coors.
sc.charity.s: No public record of named charitable programs with dollar amounts ≥1% revenue.
sc.animals.s: Not applicable; beverage company with no animal testing.
sc.guns.s: Does not manufacture or retail firearms.
sc.privacy.s: Not applicable; beverage company with minimal consumer data collection.
sc.execPay.s: No public record of CEO-to-median-worker ratio verification.

charity.focus: Education, economic development, community development, environmental conservation, disaster relief

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
